name: expo-ios-testflight
description: Ship an Expo / React Native iOS app to TestFlight from a local Mac (or CI): build the native app with `eas build --local`, submit it, and promote it to the public external-testing group — plus a battle-tested recipe for verifying RN changes in an iOS simulator before you build. Encodes the fastlane/certificate/rsync build pitfalls, the App Store Connect JWT API (submit, external review, demo account, release notes, rate-limit handling), local↔CI version stamping, and the sandbox-input workarounds (MobAI/idb absent, macOS Accessibility blocked) for driving the Simulator.
